sections.title: High Alch
sections.note: profit re-derived: high alch − price − nature rune, volume-capped

items.name: Small plated orikalkum salvage
items.line1: buy → cast High Level Alchemy (55 Magic + nature rune)
items.detail: Buy at 47,939, alch for 50,000 (nature rune deducted). Supply-capped at 4,800 casts/4h — limit 25,000, 59,777 traded/day.

items.name: Huge bladed rune salvage
items.line1: buy → cast High Level Alchemy (55 Magic + nature rune)
items.detail: Buy at 37,952, alch for 40,000 (nature rune deducted). Supply-capped at 4,800 casts/4h — limit 25,000, 59,077 traded/day.

sections.title: Sets
sections.note: GE-clerk set exchange, daily guide prices, no tax in RS3 · thinnest-leg volume gated

items.name: Armadyl armour set (combine)
items.line1: buy pieces, combine at the GE clerk, sell the set
items.detail: Margin at daily guide prices; thinnest leg trades 46/day, projected 4 conversions/4h (≈22.7M per window). Guide prices are midpoints — real offers fill a few percent worse.
